summary: Focana 2.4.3 tightens update trust and makes planned sessions easier to start without crowding the screen.
improvements: The session start flow now separates planning from choosing time, with Quick start available on the planning screen and timer/Pomodoro choices on the next screen.
Compact task preview now opens closer to the window edges and includes a clear Hide tasks control so subtasks can be tucked away again.
fixes: Settings now keeps a ready-to-install update visible even if a late updater event reports an error after download.
Settings now explains when Focana was launched from a mounted DMG and needs to be moved to Applications before updating.
